subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! A telegram was dispatched today, though it was very brief. The detailed account is this: praise be to God, in the protection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی تلغرافی امروز ارسال شد ولی مختصر است مفصل اینکه الحمد لله در صون
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @importance of prayer, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
